results.rendered_html:
ghaṭī
1 A small jar.
2 A measure of time equal to 24 minutes.
3 A small water-pot used in calculating the Ghaṭikās or time of the day.
Comp.
— kāraḥ a potter.
— graha, -grāha a. see ghaṭagraha.
— yaṃtraṃ
1 a machine for raising water (largely used in India), the rope and bucket of a well; see araghaṭṭa.
2 a contrivance (like a clepsydra) to ascertain the ghaṭikās or time of the day.
